summary: FieldSnap Pro v1.1 update verified end-to-end in web preview (375x667). All 6 requirement items pass: (1) Text tool color palette REPLACED by text-invert-off/text-invert-on chips; color-red disappears for Text and reappears for Circle. (2) Toolbar DOM order confirmed by x-coordinates: select→marker→text→circle→arrow→rectangle→freedraw. (3) editor-save-button renders 16px above viewport bottom under SafeAreaView with edges including 'bottom' + toolbarWrap.paddingBottom=spacing.lg. (4) shouldShowSharePrompt uses fsp.lastShareAppPromptCount and triggers on count%5===0; observation.tsx renders like-prompt modal with like-share-button and like-dismiss-button (code path verified — cannot trigger via 5 real saves in web preview since captureRef needs native). (5) Settings ABOUT section exposes open-privacy-policy and contact-support-button (mailto:support@fieldsnap.app?subject=FieldSnap%20Pro%20Feedback via encodeURIComponent(`${APP_NAME} Feedback`)). (6) /privacy renders with privacy-back-button, 'Privacy Policy' header, and all mandated sections (as is, no liability, user responsibility, no data collection, on-device storage, permissions, third-party). Legacy text elements (no `invert`, only `color`) still render via renderElement fallback branch in editor.tsx:990-1005. No React Native red screen or runtime pageerror on /, /settings, /privacy, /editor. Minor: RN-Web deprecation warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' appears on every route (from `<View pointerEvents="none">` usages in editor.tsx and Toast) — non-blocking but should be migrated.

issues: Save button bottom_gap=16px on 667h viewport — acceptable but on iPhones with home indicator (34pt) the SafeArea inset will absorb this; recommend verifying on a real device once. On the web preview no bottom inset is reported, so the fixed spacing.lg padding is what protects it.

react_native_issues.issue: RN-Web deprecation warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents. Reference: /app/frontend/app/editor.tsx:665 and :672 (`pointerEvents="none"` on stamp & watermark <View>) — migrate to style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}.

action_items: Optional: replace `pointerEvents="none"` prop with style.pointerEvents in editor.tsx (stamp & watermark overlays) to silence RN-Web deprecation warning.
Consider bumping the 'FieldSnap Pro • v1.0' footer string in settings.tsx to v1.1 to match this release (currently still says v1.0).
critical_code_review_comments: editor.tsx: commitTextModal sets color: undefined on edit — good, ensures legacy color is cleared when converting to invert-style. Confirmed.
observations.ts.shouldShowSharePrompt correctly guards against re-prompting the same milestone via fsp.lastShareAppPromptCount; old fsp.sharePrompted key is no longer referenced (grep-clean).
observation.tsx useFocusEffect triggers shouldShowSharePrompt on every focus — will re-check on gallery back-nav too, but the `count > last` guard prevents duplicate prompts. Acceptable.
settings.tsx footer still reads 'FieldSnap Pro • v1.0' despite v1.1 release.
seed_data_creation: None — no auth, no backend calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new v1.1 testIDs present: text-invert-off, text-invert-on, modal-invert-on/off, modal-size-S/M/L, open-privacy-policy, contact-support-button, privacy-back-button, like-prompt, like-share-button, like-dismiss-button. Backend not applicable — this app is 100% on-device (AsyncStorage). To trigger the like-prompt in a real device, save 5 observations and land on /observation — shouldShowSharePrompt() fires from useFocusEffect.
